messages.subject: [R-jobs] Business Intelligence LEAD (weather insurance ops)
messages.body_plain:
Dear List,

WorldCover is hiring a full-time BI Analyst / Data Engineer to support 
our weather insurance operations. IMHO this is a fantastic opportunity 
to build innovative fintech solutions from scratch and to join a dynamic 
team that's focused on mitigating climate risks for millions of small 
businesses.

https://hire.withgoogle.com/public/jobs/worldcovrcom/view/P_AAAAAAHAAC-LS7vh6mYOza

Thanks for your consideration. Feel free to circulate, --Mel.

-- 
Melanie BACOU
Head of Research
WorldCover PBC
melanie.bacou at worldcovr.com  
skype:mbacou
http://worldcovr.com/

Torsten
